$comment: Config for THIS repo's own self-check run only (.github/workflows/self-check.yml). The actions-pinned-gate's source and tests necessarily contain the version-comment markers they enforce (`# vX.Y.Z` after a pinned SHA), exactly like the source-leak scanner's own rule definitions contain the markers it detects. Those two files are exempted here by basename; consuming repos never receive this config and are unaffected.
